_comment: Minimal, generalised flooring config. Customer only fills in layer names. Logic: floor the whole store_outline; for every zone_outline apply its rule -> action 'skip' leaves that region empty, action 'floor' (default) tiles it. If no zones are found, the complete store is floored.

wall_frame._comment: Wall cross-section copied verbatim from the source DXF into the output. Name the customer's wall + wall-hatch + partition layers here (any names). mirror_layers = copied whole (HATCH fill + outlines). hatch_layers = extra HATCH/outline-only layers. Set mirror_layers to [] to omit walls entirely.

exclude_rooms._comment: Remove flooring from rooms identified by a TEXT LABEL (not a closed polygon). The balloon method seeds from the matching text and inflates to the surrounding walls. Use this for toilets/rooms that have a name tag but no drawn boundary. text_layers = layers carrying the room labels (null = search all). keywords = room words to remove.
